title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Rustomjee Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Rustomjee Group
jsonLd.description:
Rustomjee Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Rustomjee Group:
Rustomjee Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group!
